deeprfp.description: DeepRFP AI procurement connector: analyze tenders, draft proposals, auto-fill questionnaires, build compliance matrices, and review bids. Run `npm install && npm run build` in mcp-servers/deeprfp first.

procurement-connectors.description: Unified search across public bidding sources: SAM.gov, HigherGov, BidBanana, Texas ESBD, Bonfire (UT Dallas, Lewisville), Jaggaer (UNT, Texas A&M), Ionwave (Denton), OpenGov, DemandStar, PlanetBids. Keyless sources (esbd, utd, lewisville-tx) work with no config. Run `npm install && npm run build` in mcp-servers/procurement-connectors first.

filesystem.description: Read and write proposal documents, tender attachments, and exports.

fetch.description: Fetch published tender notices and procurement portal pages as markdown.
